title: Blue Archive Halo
description: render halos for beacons. client only.
body:
render halos for beacons. client only mod.

works with most of shaderpacks.

render bigger and more halos for higher level. works with other mods that unlock max level of beacon. support up to level 16.

works with ModMenu. able to change style of halo.

no english localization yet

screenshot:
![screenshot for halos with shader BSL_v10.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7566d41454eacb5993ad73f6585ec6c740d600e4_0.webp)
